user.title: Thailand Easy Pass
user.description: Enter your Easy Pass account credentials from thaieasypass.exat.co.th

data_description.username: Your Easy Pass login username (usually your ID card number)

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Easy Pass
reauth.description: Your Easy Pass session has expired. Please enter the password for **{username}** again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to thaieasypass.exat.co.th. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Easy Pass account is already configured.
